error_signature: continues the workflow by running the rest of it 5 times
title: Workflow continues multiple times instead of once
symptom: The workflow continues executing multiple times instead of waiting for all items to complete, leading to unexpected behavior.
not_this_if: Workflow completes as expected without async handling
root_cause: The workflow is not properly configured to wait for all async items to complete before proceeding, causing it to trigger subsequent steps multiple times.
fix_steps: Add a switch node to check if all items are completed
Use the expression '{{ $input.all().every(item => item.json.status === "COMPLETED") }}' in the switch node
agent_instruction: Implement a switch node to check if all items are completed before continuing the workflow.
